title: One Beep, Two Beeps
short description: One Beep, Two Beeps is a nickname given to a signal emitted by the Norwegian Navy communications center in Bodø
description:
**One Beep, Two Beeps** is a nickname given to a signal emitted by the Norwegian Navy communications center in Bodø (callsigns: LBA, LBJ, JWG, JWT, JWZ, JXU). As implied by the name, it consists of noise with occasional 760 Hz beeps, one or more at a time.

The signal sometimes appears on the Norwegian [STANAG 4285](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/STANAG 4285) channels.
